elements.text: You are planning your wedding with your fiancé. Planning your wedding has sometimes put stress on your relationship, and you and your fiancé have had a few arguments during the process. Once the wedding is over after everything that has happened, you think you and your spouse will feel close...

elements.name: Stress in Your Relationship_Romantic Relationships_puzzle1
